rows.label: qev070301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, [ST:playername ],
you've been to the White Tree Continent, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Did you happen to see the CEO...
I mean... someone who looked like Doc around there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0010
rows.name: Reply

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that you haven't seen him.

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0021
rows.name: Point out that he said "CEO".

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I see...
Since you run all over Mira,
I thought maybe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Well, you see, for the new product we're releasing at Factory 1.21,
Doc went to the White Tree Continent to gather materials.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0005
rows.name:
He warped there using the Mirarian, so
he should have been able to come right back
once he got the materials, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0006
rows.name:
Since then, he's been completely unreachable
and hasn't returned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0007
rows.name:
To pay off his debt, Doc established a company
called Factory 1.21 to sell weapons to BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0008
rows.name:
And I'm working there too, but
whenever I call him "Doc", he gets all noisy and says
"Call me CEO!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Funny, right?
At first, he seemed reluctant to do it,
but now he acts totally like a businessman.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0010
rows.name:
So, since we're releasing a new product soon,
he went to the White Tree Continent to gather materials.
But... he's been completely unreachable since then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0011
rows.name:
He warped there using the Mirarian, so
he should have been able to come back in an instant
once he got the materials...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Aaah! If Doctor B doesn't come back,
Factory 1.21 will go bankrupt...
And he won't be able to repay his debt to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0013
rows.name:
All that will be left is the debt I carry...
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!
If that happens, I'm ruined! Absolutely ruined![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0014
rows.name:
As if chasing after the vanished Doctor B,
I will also disappear secretly into the darkness...!
Hehe... Hehehehe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Hey, Veven-kun.
It's not fair if only you survive...
Let's go together, to a world with no debts or responsibilities...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0016
rows.name:
C-Calm down, Graham-san!
We don't know for sure that anything happened yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0017
rows.name:
But there's been absolutely no contact!?
Did he run away to the future!?
Whatever it is, it's over! It's already over![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hehehe...!
Hey, you there... want to go together too?
There's nothing good about staying here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him you will go with him.

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0041
rows.name: Refuse, saying you have things to do.

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hey! Don't you get desperate too!
Did something bad happen to you?
Cheer up, let's be positive![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0020
rows.name:
That's right! Let's be positive, Graham-san!
Life is full of fun things!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0021
rows.name:
...That's right, [ST:playername ]!
Could you go to the White Tree Continent
and bring Doc back?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0022
rows.name:
The survival of Factory 1.21 is on the line,
so I won't skimp on the reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0023
rows.name:
Right? Please?
At this rate, Graham-san is going to lose his mind
before Doc gets back...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Thank you!
The Mirarian should have flown to the vicinity of
the Ash Cinderdunes in the north of the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0025
rows.name:
There might be some clues
around there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0026
rows.name:
No matter where Doc is...
Even if he went to the future,
you absolutely must bring him back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0027
rows.name:
There are still so many things
I need to learn from Doc.
Both Graham-san and I need Doc.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0051
rows.name: Say that you need him too.

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0060
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0061
rows.name: Point out that there's a possibility he might be dead.

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'm glad to hear you say that.
Even though he's such a sloppy and sketchy person...
He's incredibly popular![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0029
rows.name:
You're a realist, aren't you.
It's true there's a possibility of that, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0030
rows.name:
I believe there's no way Doc would kick the bucket
that easily.
So, I'm sure... it'll be fine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0040
rows.name:
You absolutely must bring Doc back
from the White Tree Continent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0041
rows.name:
Both Graham-san and I need Doc.
There are still so many things
I need to learn from him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0042
rows.name:
I heard the story from Doc.
So Doc got captured by that guy named Gud?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0043
rows.name:
I can't express my gratitude with just words like "thank you."
Because if you hadn't gone,
Doc might have been killed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0044
rows.name:
Veven! I told you to call me CEO, not Doc!
I am the Representative Director of Factory 1.21![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0045
rows.name:
Yes, yes.
Understood, Cee-Eee-Ohh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0046
rows.name:
...Honestly, lately he's been completely hooked on
running a company, or rather, making money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0047
rows.name:
He used to say grand things like
"Science is purely for creating the future"...
He really is a hopeless person, isn't he.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0091
rows.name: Be exasperated and say he's beyond help.

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0101
rows.name: Say that is also part of Doctor B's charm.

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0048
rows.name:
Since you've been dragged into this much trouble,
your words hold a lot of weight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0049
rows.name:
If all people from the future are like this,
sometimes I worry about the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0050
rows.name:
For you to be able to say that even after getting
dragged into so much trouble...
You really are amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Well, it's not like I hate him as a person either,
which is why I ended up becoming an employee like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0052
rows.name:
...Anyway, this is your reward.
Thank you so much for saving our CEO![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0053
rows.name:
...Listen, Veven!
Graham here has sworn loyalty to me
and said he will join Factory 1.21![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0054
rows.name:
Eh! Eeh!?
I just wanted you to repay the debt
as soon as possible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0055
rows.name:
In other words, you want to grow this company with me,
make a ton of money, and have me
repay the debt, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0056
rows.name:
Hahaha! You helpless fool!
Veven!
You finally have a subordinate too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0057
rows.name:
Oh boy...
Graham-san looks like he caves under pressure,
so he's definitely going to end up joining the company...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0110
rows.name: Help

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0111
rows.name: Throw Graham a lifeline.

rows.label: qev070301_JNK0120
rows.name: Observe

rows.label: qev070301_SEL0121
rows.name: Watch how things play out.

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0058
rows.name:
That's right!
There is absolutely no reason
for me to work at this compan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0059
rows.name:
Hey... Don't just stand there spacing out, help me!
No matter how you look at it, there is absolutely no reason
for me to work at this compan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0060
rows.name:
...Hmph! Come over here without complaining.
We are starting the new employee training right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0061
rows.name:
Eh! Eeh!!
Wait, that's...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0062
rows.name:
Haha... Well, Doc's skills are solid, and
not to brag, but I think we have
a pretty good lineup of products.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070301_MSG0063
rows.name:
If you don't mind, please continue to use our company
from now on.[ST:wait ]
